title: Vin Beauty Mr & Mrs Cake Topper Wedding Engagement Anniversary Cake Toppers Decorations Gold Glitter Bride and Groom Sign
features: 【High-quality Materials】This golden cake decoration is made of high-quality glitter cardboard and small wooden sticks. It is shiny in color and not easy to deform. It can be used for cakes, desserts, etc. with confidence.

【Exquisite Design】This Mr. and Mrs. cake topper is composed of the golden ""Mr. and Mrs."" words, which will sparkle under the light. The unique and fashionable design can easily enhance the party atmosphere and attract people's attention.
【Packing List】The package contains 1 card (16.5*16cm/6.5*6.3in), 1 wooden stick (15cm/5.9in long), 2 glue dots, which can add brilliance and charm to your commemorative event.

【Decoration Use】This Mr. and Mrs. wedding cake topper is of suitable size and is very suitable for decorating cakes, cupcakes, ice cream, fruits, cookies and other desserts, which can enhance the visual appeal of the party. Not edible, do not use in the oven or microwave.

【Wide Application】This Mr. and Mrs. wedding cake topper can be used not only for romantic wedding parties, but also for elegant wedding anniversaries, bridal showers, engagements, wedding parties and other commemorative scenes to add a festive atmosphere.
description: Quantity: 1 Piece Color: Gold Material: Paper + Wood Product Size: Cardboard 16.5*16cm/6.5*6.3in, Wooden Stick Length 15cm/5.9in Packing List: 1 Cardboard, 2 Wooden Sticks, 2 Glue Dots
